description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a matte black finish and a streamlined, ergonomic design. The rifle features a thumbhole stock with an integrated cheek rest and a pistol grip, providing enhanced control and comfort. It is equipped with a detachable curved box magazine and a prominent upper receiver rail, on which a compact red dot sight is mounted. The barrel is of standard length and appears to be free-floating, with a simple muzzle and no visible device attached. The fore-end has ribbed texturing for improved grip, and the overall construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials. This rifle is designed for urban or tactical use, with features that support rapid aiming and maneuverability.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a thumbhole stock, curved magazine, and mounted red dot sight. It has a ribbed fore-end and a streamlined, ergonomic design.
description_view_0: The left side view shows the thumbhole stock, pistol grip, curved magazine, ribbed fore-end, and mounted red dot sight clearly.
description_view_1: The front view displays the narrow barrel profile, the alignment of the sight, and the symmetry of the stock and fore-end.
description_view_2: The right side view highlights the same features as the left, with the magazine, stock, and sight visible, but from the opposite side.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the back of the stock, the cheek rest, and the alignment of the sight along the top rail.
